---
title: "Aunt Louisa’s Travels"
---

## Aunt Louisa’s Travels

**Author:** Anna Butler
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (July 1852- June 1854).

### Notes

This is a series in which Aunt Louisa describes her journey to Switzerland to her nephew Arthur and her nieces Caroline and Grace. (Butler\'s brother the Rev. William Butler had a son Arthur and a daughter Grace, and a sister-in-law, Louisa Barnett.)

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
